decision_notes: keep_survivor — gemini's '1982 NHSA' women's/mixed data is wholesale year-shifted: every doomed claim exactly matches canonical 1983_worlds_boulder_nhsa (authoritative-results-1980-1985.txt's 1983 NHSA section). Roster evidence: Tricia George + Nancy Reynolds have zero 1982 appearances in any source (mirror, magazine, FBW). 1982 IFAB events feature different female competitors (Cindy Marshall, Tami Peltz) with no overlap to gemini's '1982 NHSA' roster. Authoritative's 1982 NHSA section is internally consistent.

keep_survivor per Rule 3 (default to authoritative absent external contradiction). Both sources now agree Jodi Sebastian was on the team (via Chandler↔Sebastian alias resolution). No primary source available to break the tie. Storment preserved to honor authoritative claim; reversible to use_doomed if Footbag World 1984, NHSA/WFA bulletin, or participant recollection surfaces favoring Aubin.
